title: Cosmic Brain
definition: The intelligent field of awareness that encompasses all sentient beings and their collective consciousness.

difficulty_levels.beginner: A way to think about the universe as a single, intelligent mind that is aware of everything within it.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A philosophical concept that posits the existence of an all-encompassing intelligence behind the interconnected consciousness of sentient beings.
difficulty_levels.expert: A concept that explores the idea of a non-local, unified consciousness underlying the individual consciousnesses of sentient beings. It suggests that the universe is in some sense self-aware and evolving through each sentient being's experiences.

extra_fields.insight: Each human mind is seen as a unique node in an interconnected neural network, and enlightenment is understood as the firing of this neuron, contributing to the collective consciousness or 'cosmic thought'.
